name: Roast Aubergine and Vegetable Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 cm cube peeled ginger, cut into thin strips
1 Yellow bell pepper, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 230°C (450°F).
2. Char the aubergine over a medium gas flame, turning frequently, until all the skin is blackened. If not possible, proceed with baking.
3. Bake the aubergine for about 30 minutes, or until collapsed.
4. Meanwhile, heat vinegar in a frying pan (skillet).
5. When boiling, add ginger and cumin seeds. Cook, stirring, for 30 seconds.
6. Add yellow pepper and water if necessary. Saute for about 10 minutes, or until the pepper is soft, adding more boiling water as required.
7. Add courgettes and tomatoes, and continue to cook for about 2-3 minutes, or until the courgette is just soft.
8. Peel the aubergine and chop the flesh roughly.
9. Put everything in a food processor and blend with pulse action until all is roughly chopped.
10. Season to taste with salt and black pepper.
11. Serve with Lavash (crispy flat bread) or pitta as a light lunch or snack; use instead of tomato sauce in practically any pasta recipe, such as spaghetti, lasagne, etc. Keeps in fridge for 1 week.
